zh.lifeSummary: 當William Plumpton於1400年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Sir William Plumpton35歲，母親Alice Gisburn37歲。他於1403年6月16日與Alice Foljambe在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Plumpton于1400年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Sir William Plumpton35岁，母亲Alice Gisburn37岁。他于1403年6月16日与Alice Foljambe在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Plumpton was born in 1400, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Plumpton, was 35 and his mother, Alice Gisburn, was 37. He married Alice Foljambe on 16 June 1403, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Plumpton est né en 1400, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Plumpton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Gisburn, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alice Foljambe le 16 juin 1403, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Plumpton 1400 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Plumpton 35 und seine Mutter Alice Gisburn 37. Er hat am 16. Juni 1403 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England Alice Foljambe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1440 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Alice Foljambe il 16 giugno 1403, nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Plumptonが1400年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Plumptonは35歳，母Alice Gisburnは37歳であった。1403年6月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースでAlice Foljambeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Plumpton(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Plumpton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Gisburn(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1403년 6월 16일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 Alice Foljambe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Plumpton nasceu em 1400, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Plumpton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Gisburn, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Foljambe em 16 de junho de 1403, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Plumpton родился в 1400 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Plumpton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Gisburn, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Foljambe 16 июня 1403 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Plumpton nació en 1400, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Plumpton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Gisburn, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alice Foljambe el 16 de junio de 1403, en Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1440, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
